title: Universal Browser Backup v2.1.2-pre Release Notes
description: Pre-release notes for v2.1.2-pre featuring refined browser detection, expanded coverage, and enhanced compatibility

items.title: Chromium Browser Detection Engine (Static Method Refinement)
items.description: Finalized detection logic through static `BrowserDetection.get_chromium_browsers()` method providing consistent crawling API across LOCALAPPDATA, Program Files, and Program Files (x86) paths. Maintains AppData and Program Files lookup patterns for consumer compatibility.
items.author: Release Engineering

items.title: User Data / User Data V2 Subdirectory Discovery
items.description: Full implementation for discovering and normalizing User Data and User Data V2 subdirectories across all supported Chromium-family browsers. Enables authoritative identification of Chrome-like profiles regardless of variant naming conventions.
items.author: Release Engineering

items.title: Normalization Schema v2.1.2-pre
items.description: Adopted unified `normalize_browser()` schema for metadata alignment between PowerShell consumer and Docker container consumers. Schema retains Local State existence as required directory filter. Consistency enforced across 12+ metadata fields.
items.author: Core Team

items.title: Browser Family Catalog Expansion (40+ Families)
items.description: Comprehensive browser catalog in `configs/browsers.json` now includes 40+ browser families with detailed metadata, prioritization rules, and detector patterns. Families cover market-leading Chromium derivatives, legacy browsers, and regional variants with capability flags.
items.author: Browser Research

items.title: PowerShell Consumer Integration
items.description: Synchronized PowerShell consumers (`GUI\App.ps1`, `UniversalBrowserBackup.ps1`) to reference new detection APIs. Consumer-facing exception handling and retention list architecture preserved; zero regressions introduced. All PowerShell test suites passing (18/18 Pester).
items.author: PowerShell Team

items.title: Docker Consumer Integration
items.description: Entrypoint `docker/…/browsers-entrypoint.ps1` updated to consume new API contracts and validated end-to-end. Production Docker image `unibab/universalbrowserbackup:v2.1.2-pre` built, pushed, and smoke-tested. All Docker test suites passing (7/7).
items.author: DevOps

items.title: Test Suite Validation Complete
items.description: All downstream test suites validated: 18/18 Pester, 12/12 pytest, 7/7 Docker validation tests passing. No regressions introduced to log retention, exception handling, or legacy feature flags.
items.author: QA Team

items.title: Release Bundle Assembly v2.1.2-pre
items.description:
UniversalBrowserBackup-v2.1.2-pre.zip assembled containing
- UniversalBrowserBackup.ps1
- GUI\App.ps1
- UniversalBrowserBackup.exe
- docs\ directory and submodules
Cross-reference validated against artifact checksum lists.
items.author: Release Engineering

items.title: Release Notes RSS Feed Ready
items.description: `updates/whatsnew-v2.1.2.json` created and populated with 8 structured release items following semantic versioning changelog conventions. Feed includes IDs, titles, dates, and standardized schema for downstream consumers.
items.author: Release Engineering
